details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) all present, reports/audit/ exists, but reports/board/ does not exist.
reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs, reports/audit/ exists, but reports/board/ is absent.

moltbot/ directory contains active code files: board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py. Additionally, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, and scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py reference Moltbot.
